description: This file contains the implementation of MainViewModel, a ViewModel class that manages authentication state, user actions (login, lock, unlock, call protected resource, logout), and status logging for the Android application's main UI. It interacts with AuthManager for authentication workflows and ApiClient for network requests, adhering to the MVVM architecture.

classes.name: MainViewModel
classes.description: A ViewModel that manages authentication state, user actions, and status logging for the main UI.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs a demo login using a mock API and updates the authentication state accordingly.

methods.name: lock
methods.description: Locks the current session, requiring re-authentication.

methods.name: unlock
methods.description: Unlocks the session after biometric or device credential verification.

methods.name: callProtected
methods.description: Calls a protected API endpoint via the network client.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Logs out the user, clearing stored tokens.
